allow: Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('build:', p.scripts.build\); console.log\('lint:', p.scripts.lint\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**p.get\('dependencies',{}\), **p.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; [print\(k\) for k in deps if 'puppeteer' in k.lower\(\) or 'playwright' in k.lower\(\) or 'screenshot' in k.lower\(\) or 'canvas' in k.lower\(\)]")

Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('html2canvas:', p.dependencies['html2canvas'] || p.devDependencies?.['html2canvas'] || 'not found'\); console.log\('modern-screenshot:', p.dependencies['modern-screenshot'] || 'not found'\)")
